response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: Spoken dialogue and vocal performance phonetically match the Reference JSON for the song segment. 2. JSON Usage: Fully utilized Reference JSON for lyrics and translations; manual transcription and translation were applied for the initial presentation segment. 3. Timing & Pacing: Applied aggressive end-time truncation during rapid speech and transitions to prevent cascading delays. Subtitled prominent on-screen text for the song title.

subtitles.original: And then, uh, what else, what else? Oh, my makeup!
subtitles.english: And then, uh, what else, what else? Oh, my makeup!

subtitles.original: メイクも可愛いでしょ？ エヘヘヘ！
subtitles.english: My makeup is cute too, right? Hehehe!

subtitles.original: And then I have so many, like, hand accessories as well.
subtitles.english: And then I have so many, like, hand accessories as well.

subtitles.original: Look at that! Look how cool that is!
subtitles.english: Look at that! Look how cool that is!

subtitles.original: And then we'll do like a quick scan of the... T-pose quick scan.
subtitles.english: And then we'll do like a quick scan of the... T-pose quick scan.

subtitles.original: Quick scan of the body.
subtitles.english: Quick scan of the body.

subtitles.original: Whoa! Whoa! Whoa!
subtitles.english: Whoa! Whoa! Whoa!

subtitles.original: There's also something very special.
subtitles.english: There's also something very special.

subtitles.original: I have an MC tail now.
subtitles.english: I have an MC tail now.

subtitles.original: If you noticed earlier, normally when I dance, I have my tail just, you know, free.
subtitles.english: If you noticed earlier, normally when I dance, I have my tail just, you know, free.

subtitles.original: But you know, this is the MC resting tail.
subtitles.english: But you know, this is the MC resting tail.

subtitles.original: Cause the tail also needs resting periods as well.
subtitles.english: Cause the tail also needs resting periods as well.

subtitles.original: So this is my MC tail.
subtitles.english: So this is my MC tail.

subtitles.original: Very cute! I hope you guys like it!
subtitles.english: Very cute! I hope you guys like it!

subtitles.original: Oh my god! And this was designed by, of course, the amazing Mika-mama!
subtitles.english: Oh my god! And this was designed by, of course, the amazing Mika-mama!

subtitles.original: ありがとうございます！ めっちゃくちゃ可愛いデザインになりました。
subtitles.english: Thank you very much! It turned into a very, very cute design.

subtitles.original: ありがとうございます！ エヘヘ。
subtitles.english: Thank you very much! Hehehe.

subtitles.original: But that's not all.
subtitles.english: But that's not all.

subtitles.original: I mean, if I get a new outfit, I feel like it's only fair that...
subtitles.english: I mean, if I get a new outfit, I feel like it's only fair that...

subtitles.original: ...some other people get new outfits!
subtitles.english: ...some other people get new outfits!

subtitles.original: おーい！ 来て来て来て！
subtitles.english: Hey! Come here, come here, come here!

subtitles.original: Ahhh! The Bae Dancers also get new outfits!
subtitles.english: Ahhh! The Bae Dancers also get new outfits!

subtitles.original: You get an outfit! You get an outfit! Everyone gets an outfit!
subtitles.english: You get an outfit! You get an outfit! Everyone gets an outfit!

subtitles.original: Look at them! Oh, oh, oh...
subtitles.english: Look at them! Oh, oh, oh...

subtitles.original: Oh yeah! Oh wow! Oh so sexy! Oh!
subtitles.english: Oh yeah! Oh wow! Oh so sexy! Oh!

subtitles.original: So the new dancers have also, of course, upgraded outfits.
subtitles.english: So the new dancers have also, of course, upgraded outfits.

subtitles.original: They have shorts with the boots, and the socks, and the jacket.
subtitles.english: They have shorts with the boots, and the socks, and the jacket.

subtitles.original: Wow, look at that! Amazing!
subtitles.english: Wow, look at that! Amazing!

subtitles.original: And then on the back of the jacket, they have my logo.
subtitles.english: And then on the back of the jacket, they have my logo.

subtitles.original: 後ろにロゴもあります。
subtitles.english: There is also a logo on the back.

subtitles.original: Whoa! Kawaii!
subtitles.english: Whoa! Kawaii!

subtitles.original: I also designed... well, not designed, but I wanted the design...
subtitles.english: I also designed... well, not designed, but I wanted the design...

subtitles.original: ...to be easy for them to dance in as well.
subtitles.english: ...to be easy for them to dance in as well.

subtitles.original: So this is the upgraded Bae Dance Team! Yay!
subtitles.english: So this is the upgraded Bae Dance Team! Yay!

subtitles.original: どう？ 可愛い？
subtitles.english: How is it? Cute?

subtitles.original: うん。 ポーズ。 ポーズ。
subtitles.english: Yeah. Pose. Pose.

subtitles.original: 可愛い！ イェーイ！
subtitles.english: Cute! Yay!

subtitles.original: まあ、せっかくなんでね。
subtitles.english: Well, since we're here.

subtitles.original: Since we all have new outfits, I think it's only fitting that...
subtitles.english: Since we all have new outfits, I think it's only fitting that...

subtitles.original: ...we continue the rest of the live like this, with our new outfits!
subtitles.english: ...we continue the rest of the live like this, with our new outfits!

subtitles.original: じゃ、踊りますか？
subtitles.english: Well then, shall we dance?

subtitles.original: We're gonna do the next song on the stage over there.
subtitles.english: We're gonna do the next song on the stage over there.

subtitles.original: 行くぞ！
subtitles.english: Let's go!

subtitles.original: よいしょ、よいしょ、よいしょ...
subtitles.english: Heave-ho, heave-ho, heave-ho...

subtitles.original: よいしょ、よいしょ。 いや緊張すんな。
subtitles.english: Heave-ho, heave-ho. Man, don't be nervous.

subtitles.original: はい！ じゃ、どうぞ！
subtitles.english: Alright! Now then, here you go!
